title: Using forms to collect registrations and add email addresses to the outlook invite
excerpt: I am using forms to collect registrations for an event I’m running. I am then manually adding them to the Outlook calendar invite. Is there any workflow or automation that could speed this process up?

posts.author: Jules3110 (Julia Hodgson)
posts.cookedHtml: I am using forms to collect registrations for an event I’m running. I am then manually adding them to the Outlook calendar invite. Is there any workflow or automation that could speed this process up?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can create an automation of ‘when item created send email’ and then have that link go to them. They’d then need to click on it to accept/deny for it to show on their calendar.

There is also a 3rd party app (Calendar invite) or you could look at using make.com or zapier.

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com
